LanguageData.Ancot.QualityColorSettingDesc: Adjust the representative color of quality for apparel, weapons, etc., in mods that depend on this library.
LanguageData.Ancot.TurretSystemSettingDesc: Settings related to the turret system, such as the wearable drone turrets in the milira race mod.
LanguageData.Ancot.TurretSystem_IndicatorDesc: Displays the indicator line for turret aiming targets.
LanguageData.Ancot.TurretSystem_IndicatorColor_Player: Determines the indicator line color when a player-controlled character is targeting with a turret.
LanguageData.Ancot.TurretSystem_IndicatorOnlyDrawSele: Only draws the turret indicator line when a player-controlled character is selected.
Only draws the turret indicator line when a non-player-controlled character is selected.
LanguageData.Ancot.TurretSystem_IndicatorOnlyDrawForc: For player character, only draws the turret indicator line when a forced target is assigned.
LanguageData.Ancot.TurretSystem_Indicator_NonPlayerDe: Displays the turret aiming indicator line for non-player-controlled characters.
LanguageData.Ancot.TurretSystem_IndicatorColor_NonPla: Determines the indicator line color when a non-player-controlled character is targeting with a turret.
LanguageData.Ancot.WeaponExtraRenderSettingDesc: Settings for rendering additional overlays when holding a weapon, such as the scabbard in the Kiiro mod.
LanguageData.Ancot.WeaponExtraRender_DrawDesc: Whether to draw additional weapon textures.
LanguageData.Ancot.ApparelPolicySettingsDesc: Settings for preset apparel policies in race mods that depend on this library.
LanguageData.Ancot.ApparelPolicy_GenerateAtStartDesc: Whether to create the preset apparel policy for the race once when starting a new game.
LanguageData.Ancot.ApparelPolicy_AutoSetForColonistDe: Automatically assign the preset apparel policy for the corresponding race when recruited.
LanguageData.Ancot.Drone_TabAvailableDesc: Choose how to access the drone management panel. Enabling the menu will add a drone panel button to the bottom menu; enabling the button will add a shortcut to the drone panel above the mech panel.
